Pei Qin Ť£īś¨Ĺ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pei Qin (Ť£īś¨Ĺ). Son of Pei Xuan, he was a companion of Sun Deng. Argued about the ancients. Pei Qin was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
